messages.msg_string: I know of people who have lost their lives because of a tiny dent they didn't fix.
It's only natural for a knight to lend them aid.
Still, a doll for Plachta... Heh heh heh... Time to put my skills to work... This is going to be great... Heh heh.
Puppet shows are wonderful things! The playwright accounts for every little detail to craft a moving story!
You have someone right here who's saying they want to hear you sing. What's there to worry about?
Hehe. That's a secret. Anyway, thanks again for your help.
